message:
chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs from latest local suite run (round 2)

Second pass of artifact regeneration from a fresher local suite run on
top of HEAD's already-refreshed snapshot. Same shape as the prior
"chore(artifacts): refresh e2e/CI/test logs ..." commit:

- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json — generated_at_unix_ms / ts_utc_unix_ms /
  duration_ms only; passed/total/failed case counts unchanged.
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json — ts_utc_unix_ms only.
- artifacts/testing/logs/{fj-core, fj-interpreters, fj-trace,
  fj-conformance, fj-ad, fj-dispatch}/*.json — per-test timestamps;
  no schema or pass/fail diffs.
- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json — run_id /
  started_at / finished_at / per-gate timestamps; the four synthetic
  failure summaries are byte-identical.

Keeps the tracked artifact tree in lockstep with the latest local run
so downstream diffs against future runs remain meaningful (per the
existing repo convention of committing artifact refreshes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
